metadata.title: Alan Walker - Faded
metadata.description:
Visit worldofwalker.com for early access to the ultimate Walker experience. #walkersjoin 

🎵Alan Walker - Monster (Official Music Video)🎵
https://youtu.be/vv0YJOY5txc

World of Walker, Season One: Rise of the Drones Official playlist:
https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLYT4vq6pQVStwl0HaddGRWQPj7UQmJ-5_&si=ZURkgHnw764397jz

Listen to Rise of the Drones here: https://ffm.to/wow_riseofthedrones

👕 Official Merchandise: https://www.alanwalker.com/shop

Thanks for all the love Walkers!

- Alan

Remember to subscribe to the channel and turn on 🔔

Connect with Alan Walker: 
👉  @Alanwalkermusic  
👉Join the community: https://www.worldofwalker.com   
👉Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/alanwalkermusic/  
👉TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@alanwalkermusic  
👉Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/alanwalkermusic  
👉X: https://twitter.com/IAmAlanWalker  
👉Snapchat: https://www.snapchat.com/add/alanwalkermusic  
👉Discord: https://discord.gg/alanwalker  

//////////////// 

Lyrics:
You were the shadow of my light
Did you feel us
Another start
You fade away
Afraid our aim is out of sight
Wanna see us
Alive
Where are you now
Where are you now
Where are you now
Was it all in my fantasy
Where are you now
Were you only imaginary
Where are you now
Atlantis
Under the sea
Under the sea
Where are you now
Another dream
The monsters running wild inside of me
I'm faded
I'm faded
So lost
I'm faded
I'm faded
So lost
I'm faded
These shallow waters, never met
What I needed
I'm letting go
A deeper dive
Eternal silence of the sea
I'm breathing
Alive
Where are you now
Where are you now
Under the bright
But faded lights
You set my heart on fire
Where are you now
Where are you now
Where are you now
Atlantis
Under the sea
Under the sea
Where are you now
Another dream
The monsters running wild inside of me
I'm faded
I'm faded
So lost
I'm faded
I'm faded
So lost
I'm faded

//////////////// 

CREDITS:
Vocalist: Iselin Solheim
Video Location: Tallinn, Estonia
Video produced by: Bror Bror
Directors: Rikkard & Tobias Häggbom
D.O.P: Rikkard Häggbom
Edit and grading: Bror Bror
Actor: Shahab Salehi

🎵Listen & Follow WalkerverseRadio here: https://AlanWalker.lnk.to/WalkerRadio

#Faded #AlanWalker #YouAreNotAlone
